requirements.task_name: Register a 12U player for the cheapest weekday evening spring season program
requirements.task_description: Register a new player for the Spring 2026 season in the 12U division by selecting the cheapest available weekday evening session (>= 5:00 PM) and complete registration with Pay in full.

requirements.task_name: Save the next 3 upcoming games for the 14U Thunder team to My Schedule
requirements.task_description: Find the 14U Thunder game schedule, identify the next 3 games after 05/01/2026, and add exactly those 3 to My Schedule.

requirements.task_name: Sign up for two evening concession stand volunteer shifts in June at Field 2
requirements.task_description: Register for exactly two concession stand shifts in June 2026 at Field 2 starting at or after 5:00 PM.

requirements.task_name: Buy three specific items from the league store with price and rating constraints
requirements.task_description: Purchase one youth Medium T-shirt under $20, one adult hat under $25, and one water bottle rated ≥ 4.0 stars, with Standard Shipping selected.

requirements.task_name: Register for the July pitching clinic with the most hours under $120
requirements.task_description: Among July 2026 pitching clinics priced ≤ $120, register for the clinic with the greatest total_training_hours (breaking ties by lower price).

requirements.task_name: Reserve a Wednesday evening 12U practice field with lights between 6–8 PM
requirements.task_description: Reserve a one-hour Wednesday slot between 6:00 PM and 8:00 PM on a field with lights for a 12U team.

requirements.task_name: Find a beginner 10U team within 10 miles that practices on Tuesdays or Thursdays
requirements.task_description: Locate a 10U beginner/recreational team within 10 miles of ZIP 12345 that practices on Tuesday or Thursday, and save it with a specific note to My Teams.

requirements.task_name: Save 12U bat rules and the league Code of Conduct to Saved Resources
requirements.task_description: Save the 12U bat rules and the league-wide Code of Conduct as personal saved resources.
